items.title: HYPE Token Outperforms COIN Stock By Over 40% With Hyperliquid’s Trading Volume Overtaking Coinbase
items.description: HYPE’s token price is up more than 14% year to date, while COIN’s stock is down over 27%.

items.title: Bitcoin Is Trading Like An ‘Overheated Big Tech Stock’ And Not ‘Digital Gold’, Stifel’s Bannister Warns
items.description: Bannister says Bitcoin trades as a liquidity bet on dollar decline, not a safe haven, warning the “digital gold” narrative is overstated.

items.title: Why Did OSCR Stock Gain Pre-Market After Earnings?
items.description: The company expects fiscal 2026 revenue to be between $18.7 billion and $19 billion, compared with $11.70 billion in fiscal 2025.

items.title: Bitcoin Isn’t ‘Pumpable’ Right Now And That’s Hurting MSTR’s Stock, Says CryptoQuant CEO
items.description: In a post on X, Ki Young Ju highlighted that the relationship between inflows and a pump in Bitcoin’s price has weakened compared with prior cycles.

items.title: Hedge Fund Veteran Mark Spitznagel Reportedly Warns: AI Is Real, But The Rally May Not Be
items.description: According to a Business Insider report, Spitznagel believes equities are nearing a blow-off phase and he expects enthusiasm to intensify in the coming...
